arts.ttl: Potential Aston Villa transfer is thrown into doubt as alternative emerges
arts.sum: Unai Emery has indicated previously that the teenager, who signed for the club a year ago before joining up with the squad in the summer from Red Star Belgrade, could well leave on loan this month in order to ensure he is better exposed to first-team minutes on a more regular basis, something which simply can't be guaranteed or afforded at Villa . Aston Villa defender Kosta Nedeljkovic has been linked with a move on loan to Spanish strugglers Valencia this January transfer window - but the prospect of that move coming to fruition has been cast into doubt after the relegation threatened La Liga side looked into a loan move for Bournemouth full-back Max Aarons.
